generated_exposure.exposure_text: Did you know that foreign adversaries are exploiting our reliance on global supply chains to undermine our national security? While some argue for strategic autonomy, we must recognize that this could lead to higher costs and reduced innovation. Our allies have been warning us about the risks of isolationism. Let's not make the same mistakes they did. #NationalSecurity #StrategicAutonomy
